Error: Unable to display performance ProfileFailed to unmarshal response body.json: cannot unmarshal string into Go struct field PerformanceResultsAPIResponse.page_size of type uint | Short Description: Error unmarshalling response | Probable Cause: The JSON format from the response body is not valid. | Suggested Remediation: Ensure a valid JSON is provided for processing..
